metadata.title: Construction Business | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered construction management platform for all your building operations — from project management and material tracking to timesheets, invoicing, and field service.

hero.title: 🏠 Construction business
hero.description: AdonERP allows you to handle all aspects of construction projects from start to finish while eliminating pain points such as material shortages and budget management.
hero.testimonialQuote: The most significant change that AdonERP has brought to our business operations and culture is the sense of calm that has permeated our daily work life.

projectSection.title: Groundbreaking
projectSection.description: Manage all aspects of your construction project from one dashboard. Track tasks, materials, stock moves, planning shifts and deadlines.

purchasing.title: Streamline purchasing.
purchasing.description: Keep track of vendor orders and automate procurement with purchase agreements.

barcode.title: Barcode scanning.
barcode.description: Use barcode scanners to simplify inventory operations.

materialControl.title: Material control.
materialControl.description: Track all materials stored and used on construction jobs.

costsSection.title: Keep an eye on the
costsSection.description: Invoice clients, manage contractor bills, log timesheets, track expenses and analyze cost distribution to keep every job profitable.

finishingSection.title: On to some final
finishingSection.description: Handle after-sales support, customer service requests and field service visits with organized tasks and map-based planning.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Practical tools for construction quotes, projects, inventory, timesheets, invoices and planning.

list.title: Quotation builder
list.description: Create professional construction quotes with materials, labor, and markup.

list.title: Timesheet timer
list.description: Track billable hours for crew members and subcontractors accurately.

list.title: Clear traceability
list.description: Follow every material from purchase order to job site installation.

list.title: Invoicing
list.description: Generate progress invoices based on milestones or completion percentage.

list.title: Resource planning
list.description: Schedule crew, equipment, and materials across multiple job sites.

list.title: Opportunities
list.description: Track bids, proposals, and win rates from your sales pipeline.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your construction business, project management, inventory, and field operations.

testimonials.name: Robert Johnson
testimonials.content: The most significant change that AdonERP has brought to our business operations and culture is the sense of calm that has permeated our daily work life.

testimonials.name: Maria Gonzales
testimonials.content: From material tracking to timesheets and invoicing, AdonERP streamlined our entire construction workflow. No more material shortages or budget overruns.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for construction companies and contractors.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a construction management workflow that helps you track materials, manage costs, and deliver projects on time and on budget.
